title: Claude Fable 5 + YouTube = $30,000/mo
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates a YouTube automation pipeline using Claude Fable 5 (Code) to automatically edit videos created by analyzing successful channels like Fireship. The workflow combines script writing, voice recording, and AI-driven video editing via Higsfield CLI and Auphonic for podcast-quality audio, claiming to produce monetizable content at low cost per video.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through a YouTube automation pipeline built on Claude Fable 5 (Code) that edits videos automatically after analyzing successful channels such as Fireship. The workflow chains script writing, voice recording, and AI-driven editing through the Higsfield CLI, with Auphonic handling audio cleanup for podcast-quality sound. Roberts frames the system as a way to produce monetizable content at a low cost per video, with a stated revenue target of $30,000 per month.
